name: watch-arbitrage-mcp
title: Watch Arbitrage Tracker — Rolex/Patek/AP × 13 Marketplaces
description: Cross-platform Patek/Rolex/AP arbitrage. Telegram alerts on cross-country spreads. Pay-Per-Event.
